name: ADYEN NV ADYEN ORD SHS
summary: Adyen N.V. is a global payment platform that provides businesses with a single solution to accept payments anywhere in the world. Headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands, Adyen offers a modern end-to-end infrastructure connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and other key payment methods globally, allowing merchants to accept payments across various channels, including online, mobile, and in-store. The company generates revenue through transaction fees and other related services.
